records.ety: [L., connection, from Gr. <?/ a plaiting together, fr. <?/ to plait or braid in; 'epi` upon + <?/ to twist, plait.]

defs: A figure by which one striking circumstance is added, in due gradation, to another; climax; e. g., “He not only spared his enemies, but continued them in employment; not only continued, but advanced them.”
